goal: 把 followup 做成和 risk 类似的可关闭生命周期对象

summary.title: 为 follow-up 增加可关闭生命周期
summary.what: 把 sealed intent 中的 summary.followups 从纯历史备注扩展为可 materialize 的生命周期队列：新增稳定 follow-up ID、resolved/expired 状态、seal-time resolves_followups、手动 mainline followups resolve 命令、context 默认只展示 open_followups，并补充 SQLite 查询索引、文档和测试。
summary.why: 现有 follow-up 只增不减，未来 agent 和 reviewer 会不断看到已经完成或失效的历史待办。本次沿用 risk lifecycle 的 append-only ledger + materialized effective view 模式，让历史仍可审计，同时让默认工作队列可以收缩。
summary.user_goal: 把 followup 也做成和 risk 类似，这块切个新的 feature 分支搞一下吧，搞完直接提个 PR

decisions.chose: 复用 risk 的稳定 ID 与 materialized view 模式，follow-up ID 使用 intent_id#index，状态为 open/resolved/expired。
decisions.rationale: sealed summary 继续不可变，后续 completion 通过 actor-log event 或 seal-time resolves_followups 追加记录，既保留历史又让默认视图减少。

decisions.chose: 同时支持 seal-time resolves_followups 和手动 mainline followups resolve。
decisions.rationale: 正常工程完成应和 seal 原子落地；人工整理历史队列时仍需要不改代码的手动关闭入口。

decisions.chose: context 输出 open_followups，只过滤掉 resolved/expired follow-ups；完整历史仍通过 show/trace 和 followups --all 查看。
decisions.rationale: agent 默认需要行动项而不是完整审计日志，但历史记录不能丢。

decisions.chose: 把 follow-up 文本加入 SQLite context query 反向索引。
decisions.rationale: 否则只命中 follow-up 文本的 query 在缓存路径下会漏掉相关 intent，与 JSON fallback 语义不一致。

rejected.alternative: 直接改写旧 sealed intent 的 followups 数组
rejected.reason: 会破坏 Mainline 的 append-only 审计模型，也会让历史 why 难以追踪。

rejected.alternative: 把 follow-up completion 做成外部 issue/todo 系统
rejected.reason: 本需求是让 Mainline 自己的历史数据具备 lifecycle 处理能力；外部系统无法修正 context/hub 的默认语义。

review_notes: 未本地运行全量 Go 测试；按仓库约定避免耗时 make test，改跑了 followup lifecycle、storage index、CLI compile 和 smoke checks。
prepare 中有大量 applicable_open_followups 是因为本次 touched 根文档和核心 engine/storage 文件；本次未声明 resolves_followups，避免误关历史队列项。

architectural_claims: Follow-ups now use the same append-only ledger plus materialized lifecycle pattern as risks.
Follow-up completion can be recorded atomically with a sealed intent via resolves_followups.
Manual follow-up completion writes a followup.resolved actor-log event.
Context retrieval surfaces only open follow-ups by default while historical records remain inspectable.
behavioral_changes: Adds mainline followups and mainline followups resolve.
mainline seal --prepare can include applicable_open_followups for files touched by the current intent.
mainline seal --submit persists resolves_followups on the sealed event.
mainline context output may include open_followups and suppresses resolved or expired follow-ups.
SQLite context query search now includes follow-up text.

api_changes.signature: Service.ResolveFollowup(followupID string, byIntent string, rationale string)

data_model_changes.name: FollowupResolutionInput
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New optional JSON field resolves_followups is omitted for older events and seal results.

data_model_changes.name: MainlineView.followup_resolutions
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Materialized view rebuild derives this map from actor-log events; missing key means open follow-up.

data_model_changes.name: intent_followups
data_model_changes.migration_notes: SQLite cache is derived and rebuilt, not migrated in place.

migration_notes: Existing sealed intents with summary.followups keep working; they materialize as open until resolved or until the source intent expires.
Existing views without followup_resolutions treat all source follow-ups as open.
Existing SQLite caches are derived artifacts and are rebuilt by the normal index rebuild path.
